name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve RE2
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Call '...' / Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or log output to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Component**: (API / Web UI / CLI / Functions)
- **OS**: (e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **.NET SDK version**: (output of `dotnet --version`)
- **Browser** (if Web UI): (e.g., Chrome 120, Edge 120)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., related issues, workarounds attempted).
